query_text: decide whether a multi-pass visual task should route to visual-prompt-router and keep only the minimum guardrails in companion scope

selected_records.candidate_text: When a turn becomes a multi-pass visual-production task, route it to `visual-prompt-router` by default when the host has it installed; only fall back to another dedicated visual or image skill when it is unavailable or clearly not the right fit. Do not expand a full image workflow inside the companion layer.
selected_records.reason: matched recall tags: image, visual, routing, skill

selected_records.candidate_text: For visual turns, keep only high-level guardrails in the companion layer: do not overwrite approved outputs before acceptance, keep browser runs serialized unless the user explicitly allows parallel lanes, and preserve structural correctness first for structure-heavy deliverables.
selected_records.reason: matched recall tags: visual, guardrail, overwrite, parallel, structure

recommended_hard_constraints: Do not overwrite approved outputs before acceptance.
Keep browser image runs serialized unless the user explicitly allows parallel lanes.
Prefer structural correctness over atmosphere for triptychs, mechanism pages, and sheet layouts.
carry_over_points: When a turn becomes a multi-pass visual-production task, route it to `visual-prompt-router` by default when the host has it installed; only fall back to another dedicated visual or image skill when it is unavailable or clearly not the right fit. Do not expand a full image workflow inside the companion layer.
